info.name: Church Attendance API
info.description: Complete API reference for the Church Attendance & Member Management platform.

request.description: Register a new church member. All fields except firstname, lastname, email and password are optional. Set joinWorkforce=true to flag interest in joining the workforce (admin must still formally promote the member).
Authenticate any user (MEMBER, WORKER, ADMIN). The test script auto-saves access_token and refresh_token to collection variables.
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token. Pass the refresh token in the Authorization header.
Invalidate current session. Returns 204 No Content.
Returns the authenticated user's profile including workerProfile and department if applicable.
ADMIN only. Returns the admin's own profile.

item.name: Members
item.description: All endpoints require ADMIN role unless noted.

query.description: Filter by role: MEMBER | WORKER | ADMIN (optional)
Filter by worker status: ACTIVE | INACTIVE (optional)

request.description: All fields are optional. Only provided fields are updated.
Creates a WorkerProfile for the member, assigns them to a department and sets role to WORKER. departmentId is required; profession and yearJoinedWorkforce are optional.
Removes the WorkerProfile and resets the member's role back to MEMBER. Returns 204 No Content.
Activate or deactivate a member. status: ACTIVE | INACTIVE. Returns 204.
Generates a new random password and emails it to the member. The member will need to change it on next login.

Any authenticated user (MEMBER or WORKER) can check in. location is optional for members. Workers providing location will have distance validated if ENFORCE_DISTANCE_CHECK=true. Members are always marked PRESENT; workers are PRESENT or LATE depending on workerLateOffsetSeconds.

response.name: 400 Already checked in
response.body: { "statusCode": 400, "message": "You have already checked in for this service." }

request.description: Returns the authenticated user's own attendance records. Available to all roles.

query.description: Required. UUID of the service slot.

request.description: WORKER only (department lead). Returns attendance for their department for a given slot.
Returns PRESENT/LATE/ABSENT/ON_LEAVE counts for a single service slot.
Returns top workers ranked by present+late count within the time window.
ADMIN only. Each slot references a configId (which carries a defaultVenue). Supply an optional venueOverrideId on individual slots to override the config venue for just that slot.
No serviceSlots provided — system auto-creates a single default slot.
Creates events every week until recurrenceEndDate (max 1 year from start). recurrencePattern: daily | weekly | monthly.
ADMIN only. Cannot delete past events.

variable.description: The shared recurringEventId UUID from the event series

request.description: ADMIN only. Deletes all future events in a recurring series (today and after).

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Default Sunday Config",
  "description": "Standard check-in config for Sunday services",
  "defaultVenueId": "{{venueId}}",
  "workerCheckinStartOffsetSeconds": -5400,
  "workerLateOffsetSeconds": 0,
  "memberCheckinStartOffsetSeconds": -1800,
  "checkinStopOffsetSeconds": 3600,
  "allowedDistanceInMeters": 150
}

request.description: Offsets are in seconds relative to slot startTime. Negative = before slot starts. Constraint: workerLateOffset > workerCheckinStartOffset and checkinStopOffset > workerLateOffset. defaultVenueId is required — create a Venue first and reference it here.
Fails if any service slot is still assigned to this config.
Public (JWT only). Returns paginated list of departments.
Assigns a worker as department head or assistant. type: 'head' | 'assistant'.
WORKER only. Dates must be in format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm. Creates a PENDING leave request.
ADMIN only. status: APPROVED | REJECTED.
WORKER only. Can only delete own PENDING leave requests.
WORKER only. Returns leave requests from members in the same department.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "New Believers Class",
  "type": "BELIEVERS",
  "description": "Foundation class for new members",
  "facilitatorId": "{{memberId}}",
  "startDate": "2026-07-01",
  "endDate": "2026-09-30"
}

request.description: type: BELIEVERS | BAPTISMAL | WORKERS_IN_TRAINING | BIBLE_COLLEGE

response.name: 400 Already enrolled
response.body: { "statusCode": 400, "message": "Member is already enrolled in this class" }

request.description: status: IN_PROGRESS | COMPLETED | CANCELLED
Returns all class enrollments for the authenticated user.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Church Picnic — July 20th",
  "body": "Join us for our annual church picnic at Tarkwa Bay Beach. Bring your family!",
  "audience": "ALL",
  "publishedAt": "2026-07-10T08:00:00.000Z",
  "expiresAt": "2026-07-21T00:00:00.000Z"
}

request.description: audience: ALL | WORKERS_ONLY | DEPARTMENT | INDIVIDUAL. If audience=DEPARTMENT, departmentId is required. If audience=INDIVIDUAL, targetMemberId (UUID) is required. publishedAt defaults to now if omitted.
Sends a private announcement visible only to the specified member. targetMemberId is required when audience=INDIVIDUAL.

query.description: Required for workers to receive department-targeted announcements (optional for members)

request.description: Returns visible, non-expired announcements for the current user's role. MEMBER sees ALL. WORKER sees ALL + WORKERS_ONLY + their department. Expired announcements are excluded.
type path param: child_naming | child_dedication | marriage
type field is required to identify the note type. Other fields are optional (partial update).

query.description: Start date YYYY-MM-DD (optional, defaults to 30 days ago)
End date YYYY-MM-DD (optional, defaults to today)

item.name: Venues
item.description: Named, reusable venue records. Create a venue once; reference its ID in event configs (defaultVenueId) or individual service slots (venueOverrideId). ADMIN: create, update, delete. Any authenticated user: list, get by ID.

request.description: Creates a new venue. The test script auto-saves the returned id to the venueId collection variable. name must be unique. latitude and longitude are required.
Any authenticated user. Returns all venues paginated, ordered by name.
All fields are optional. Only provided fields are updated.
Fails with 400 if the venue is referenced as a defaultVenue by any event config. Slot-level venueOverrides pointing to this venue are automatically cleared (SET NULL).

response.name: 400 In use
response.body: { "statusCode": 400, "message": "Cannot delete this venue — it is referenced by one or more event configs or slots." }

request.description: Any authenticated user. Returns profile, streak, rank, period stats, recent attendance, upcoming events, and class enrollments.

WORKER or ADMIN role. Includes streak, rank, period stats, and isDepartmentLead flag. If isDepartmentLead=true, also includes departmentLeadDetails with departmentAttendancePercentage and pending leave count.

ADMIN only. Returns total member/worker/admin counts, check-ins today, workerAttendancePercentage, congregationAttendancePercentage, departmentAttendanceSummary (per-department breakdown), newMemberRegistrationsTrend, weekly trend, top absent workers, members not seen recently, upcoming events, and pending leave count.
